raw_title: Strategizing Sustainability in Nonprofit News: Revenue Preferences of Newsroom Leaders
title_en: Strategizing Sustainability in Nonprofit News: Revenue Preferences of Newsroom Leaders
title_zh: 非营利新闻的可持续性战略：新闻编辑室领导者的收入偏好
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了非营利新闻机构如何实现财务可持续性，特别关注新闻编辑室领导者对不同收入来源的偏好。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how nonprofit news organizations can achieve financial sustainability, with a specific focus on newsroom leaders' preferences for different revenue sources.
research_direction_zh: 非营利新闻机构的商业模式与可持续发展研究
research_direction_en: Business models and sustainability research for nonprofit news organizations
